_doc: SRD 5.2.1 character classes. Mechanical fields only; spellcasting math lives in `progression.json` and is referenced by `spellcasting.ref`. Feature summaries are short paraphrases of SRD 5.2.1 mechanics (CC-BY; see /disclaimer).

1.name: Rage
1.summary: Bonus action; advantage on STR checks/saves; +rage damage on STR melee; resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing for 1 minute.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.summary: While not wearing armor: AC = 10 + DEX + CON.

2.name: Danger Sense
2.summary: Advantage on DEX saves vs. effects you can see.

2.name: Reckless Attack
2.summary: Trade defense for STR-melee attack advantage; attacks vs you have advantage until next turn.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.summary: Attack twice on your Attack action.

5.name: Fast Movement
5.summary: +10 ft speed when not in heavy armor.

7.name: Feral Instinct
7.summary: Advantage on initiative; can act normally if surprised by raging.

9.name: Brutal Strike
9.summary: When you Reckless Attack, add a 1d10 brutal-strike die and an effect.

11.name: Relentless Rage
11.summary: Drop to 0 HP while raging: CON save (DC 10, +5/use) to stay at 1 HP.

15.name: Persistent Rage
15.summary: Rage ends only at 0 HP or if you choose.

18.name: Indomitable Might
18.summary: Treat STR check totals below your STR score as your STR score.

1.name: Bardic Inspiration
1.summary: Bonus action; give an ally a Bardic Inspiration die (d6 at L1, scaling).

2.name: Expertise
2.summary: Double proficiency on two chosen skills.

2.name: Jack of All Trades
2.summary: Add half PB (down) to non-proficient ability checks.

3.name: Bard Subclass
3.summary: Choose a Bard subclass (College of Lore in SRD).

5.name: Font of Inspiration
5.summary: Inspiration die becomes d8; regain on short rest.

7.name: Countercharm
7.summary: Reaction to give advantage on saves vs. frightened/charmed nearby.

10.name: Magical Secrets
10.summary: Learn spells from any class list; inspiration die becomes d10.

20.name: Superior Inspiration
20.summary: Regain Bardic Inspiration use on initiative if none left.

1.name: Divine Order
1.summary: Choose Protector or Thaumaturge — heavy armor or extra cantrip + INT/WIS skill.

2.name: Channel Divinity
2.summary: 2/short rest: Turn Undead or Divine Spark.

3.name: Divine Domain
3.summary: Choose a Divine Domain (Life Domain in SRD).

5.name: Sear Undead
5.summary: Turn Undead now also deals radiant damage.

7.name: Blessed Strikes
7.summary: Once per turn: +1d8 radiant on weapon hit or cantrip damage.

10.name: Divine Intervention
10.summary: Cast a 5th-level or lower spell without slot, 1/long rest.

1.name: Druidic
1.summary: Secret druid language.

1.name: Primal Order
1.summary: Choose Magician or Warden — extra cantrip or martial training.

2.name: Wild Shape
2.summary: Bonus action; transform into a beast (CR per level table); 2/short rest.

2.name: Wild Companion
2.summary: Spend a Wild-Shape use to cast Find Familiar (fey, 1-hr).

3.name: Druid Circle
3.summary: Choose a Druid Circle (Circle of the Land in SRD).

5.name: Wild Resurgence
5.summary: Convert a slot to a Wild-Shape use, 1/turn.

7.name: Elemental Fury
7.summary: Magician: extra damage; Warden: bonus to AC/HP.

1.name: Fighting Style
1.summary: Choose a Fighting Style feat.

1.name: Second Wind
1.summary: Bonus action: regain 1d10+level HP; uses scale.

1.name: Weapon Mastery
1.summary: 3 weapons gain mastery property.

2.name: Tactical Mind
2.summary: Spend a Second-Wind use to add 1d10 to a failed ability check.

9.name: Tactical Shift
9.summary: Move 5 ft when you spend a Second-Wind use.

9.name: Indomitable
9.summary: Reroll a failed save; 1/long rest, scaling.

11.name: Two Extra Attacks
11.summary: Attack three times on Attack action.

13.name: Studied Attacks
13.summary: Miss → advantage on next attack vs same target.

1.name: Martial Arts
1.summary: Unarmed/monk weapons use DEX; bonus unarmed strike; die scales with level.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.summary: AC = 10 + DEX + WIS without armor.

2.name: Monk's Focus (Ki)
2.summary: Focus points = level; Flurry, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind.

3.name: Monk Subclass
3.summary: Choose a Monastic Order (Way of the Open Hand in SRD).

5.name: Stunning Strike
5.summary: Spend a Focus point on a hit to stun.

10.name: Self-Restoration
10.summary: End one condition on yourself at end of turn.

14.name: Disciplined Survivor
14.summary: Proficient in all saving throws; spend Focus to reroll a failed save.

15.name: Perfect Focus
15.summary: Roll initiative with at least 4 Focus points.

18.name: Superior Defense
18.summary: Spend 3 Focus: resistance to all damage except force/psychic for 1 minute.

1.name: Lay on Hands
1.summary: Pool of HP = 5×level; cure disease/poison for 5 from pool.

1.name: Weapon Mastery
1.summary: 2 weapons gain mastery property.

2.name: Paladin's Smite
2.summary: Cast Divine Smite without prepared; once per turn.

3.name: Paladin Subclass
3.summary: Choose a Sacred Oath (Oath of Devotion in SRD).

5.name: Faithful Steed
5.summary: Cast Find Steed without slot, 1/long rest.

6.name: Aura of Protection
6.summary: Allies within 10 ft add CHA mod to saves.

9.name: Abjure Foes
9.summary: Channel Divinity: frighten and incapacitate creatures.

10.name: Aura of Courage
10.summary: You and allies in aura immune to frightened condition.

14.name: Restoring Touch
14.summary: Lay on Hands also ends conditions.

1.name: Favored Enemy
1.summary: Hunter's Mark always prepared; bonus uses.

1.name: Weapon Mastery
1.summary: 2 weapons gain mastery property.

2.name: Deft Explorer
2.summary: Expertise in one skill; learn an extra language.

6.name: Roving
6.summary: +10 ft speed; climb/swim speeds equal to walking.

10.name: Tireless
10.summary: Temp HP from Favored Enemy; remove a level of exhaustion 1/long rest.

13.name: Relentless Hunter
13.summary: Hunter's Mark concentration is harder to break.

14.name: Nature's Veil
14.summary: Bonus action: invisibility for 1 round, 1/long rest.

17.name: Precise Hunter
17.summary: Advantage vs your Hunter's Mark target.

1.name: Expertise
1.summary: Two skills gain double proficiency.

1.name: Sneak Attack
1.summary: Once per turn: +Sneak-Attack dice on hit with finesse/ranged when you have advantage or an ally is adjacent.

1.name: Weapon Mastery
1.summary: 2 weapons gain mastery property.

2.name: Cunning Action
2.summary: Bonus action: Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

3.name: Rogue Subclass
3.summary: Choose a Roguish Archetype (Thief in SRD).

3.name: Steady Aim
3.summary: Bonus action: advantage on next attack this turn if you don't move.

5.name: Cunning Strike
5.summary: Spend Sneak-Attack dice for effects (poison, trip, withdraw, etc.).

7.name: Evasion
7.summary: Successful DEX save → 0 damage; failed → half.

7.name: Reliable Talent
7.summary: Treat d20 below 10 as 10 on proficient checks.

15.name: Slippery Mind
15.summary: Proficiency in WIS and CHA saves.

18.name: Elusive
18.summary: No attack roll has advantage against you while not incapacitated.

20.name: Stroke of Luck
20.summary: Turn a missed attack into a hit, or failed check into 20; 1/short rest.

1.name: Innate Sorcery
1.summary: Bonus action: 1-min advantage on sorcerer-spell attacks; +1 to spell save DC; 2/long rest.

2.name: Font of Magic (Sorcery Points)
2.summary: Sorcery points = level; convert slots ↔ sorcery points.

2.name: Metamagic
2.summary: Choose 2 Metamagic options; more at higher levels.

3.name: Sorcerous Origin
3.summary: Choose an Origin (Draconic Sorcery in SRD).

5.name: Sorcerous Restoration
5.summary: Regain 4 sorcery points on short rest, once per long rest.

7.name: Sorcery Incarnate
7.summary: Spend 2 sorcery points to extend Innate Sorcery.

20.name: Arcane Apotheosis
20.summary: Use 1 free Metamagic per turn during Innate Sorcery.

1.name: Eldritch Invocations
1.summary: Learn invocations; count scales by level.

1.name: Otherworldly Patron
1.summary: Choose a Patron (Fiend in SRD).

2.name: Magical Cunning
2.summary: 1-minute ritual restores half pact slots; 1/long rest.

3.name: Pact Boon
3.summary: Choose Pact of the Blade, Chain, or Tome.

9.name: Contact Patron
9.summary: Cast Contact Other Plane without slot, 1/long rest.

11.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th)
11.summary: Learn one 6th-level spell, cast once per long rest.

20.name: Eldritch Master
20.summary: Regain all expended pact slots after a 1-min meditation, 1/long rest.

1.name: Ritual Adept
1.summary: Cast any prepared/spellbook ritual without slot.

1.name: Arcane Recovery
1.summary: Once per long rest on a short rest, recover slots totalling ≤ ½ wizard level (rounded up); none above 5th.

2.name: Scholar
2.summary: Expertise in arcana, history, investigation, medicine, nature, or religion.

3.name: Arcane Tradition
3.summary: Choose a school (School of Evocation in SRD).

5.name: Memorize Spell
5.summary: Swap one prepared spell during a short rest, 1/long rest.

18.name: Spell Mastery
18.summary: Cast one 1st- and one 2nd-level prepared spell at lowest level without slot.

20.name: Signature Spells
20.summary: Two 3rd-level signature spells: cast each once per short rest without slot.
